entry.title: New: BILL015(26) (Honolulu) — ZON
entry.content:
RELATING TO AFFORDABLE HOUSING REQUIREMENTS.

Repeals affordable housing requirement options for a developer of an IPD-T project, a PD-T project, or a TOD special district project seeking bonus height or density, or both, that required for-sale affordable housing units to remain affordable for a minimum of 30 years. Repeals the marketing period requirements for for-rental and for-sale affordable dwelling units created in compliance with ROH Chapter 29.

Latest action: Postponed.

View on the council site
